scope: Chevrolet Silverado 1500, GMC Sierra 1500, Chevrolet Equinox, Chevrolet Trax, Chevrolet Malibu, Chevrolet Tahoe/Suburban, GMC Yukon/Yukon XL
validation_notes: Restored from local batch survivors and Phase 3 production records.
Family-level reconstruction was used where the original Phase 2 record did not survive locally.
Do not treat split variants as new batch scope; they are source material for the original family record.

vehicles.trim: Gasoline family schedule; 2.7T, V6, V8, and diesel variants differ
vehicles.engine: 2.7L turbo, 4.3L V6, 5.3L V8, or 6.2L V8 gasoline

interval.logic: when oil-life monitor indicates; at least annually

maintenance.notes: Change within 600 miles after CHANGE ENGINE OIL SOON appears.
Includes oil-life, air-filter status, fluid, brake, tire, steering, suspension, driveline, fuel, and exhaust checks.
Replace more frequently for dust, poor air quality, heavy traffic, reduced airflow, fogging, or odor.
Inspect more often in dusty conditions.
The 2.7L turbo interval is 60,000 miles.
Under severe use, change every 45,000 miles.

interval.logic: severe-use interval only; repeat every 45,000 miles

maintenance.notes: No fixed normal-use replacement is shown in the chart.
